rationale: Educ. Code §19.013 governs composition of a postsecondary education advisory board. It has no fiscal, property tax, or homestead exemption provisions that would conflict with increasing the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption.
quote: The district shall establish a postsecondary education advisory board to advise the district and the department regarding postsecondary education programs.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education advisory board statute.
